creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 213584
patch to update the port

- update 0.10_1 -> 0.14
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/Math-Base36
- add LICENSE_FILE
- add TEST_DEPENDS
- request maintainership, as Yi-Hsuan Hsin <mhsin@mhsin.org> 
	is absent for 11+ years, see:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/math/p5-Math-Base36/Makefile?view=log

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- Tested with:
12.1-RELEASE-p3 amd64
poudriere 3.3.4
perl 5.30.2
pkg 1.14.2
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say PASS.
